creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 216256
Fix for building with VIDEO_OPENGLES2 disabled

It is fixed upstream:  http://hg.libsdl.org/SDL/diff/389ce8cfa2a3/src/video/kmsdrm/SDL_kmsdrmvideo.c

Attaching the patch to the ports tree generated by makepatch.  Just place it in the /usr/ports/devel/sdl20/files directory (create first).
